No Poverty.reason: The course supports disadvantaged families through educational and social care, aligning with poverty reduction targets by improving opportunities and social protection (Targets 1.2, 1.3).

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course promotes physical development, self-confidence, and positive interpersonal interactions, contributing to students' mental health and overall well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: The course's core mission is providing after-school tutoring and academic support to elementary students, especially from disadvantaged families, directly fulfilling quality and equitable education targets (Targets 4.1, 4.5).
